steps.title: Use plain plural nouns
steps.content: The phrase refers to multiple works by multiple other writers associated with the Black Arts movement. Nothing in the blank needs possession, so both nouns should be plain plurals without apostrophes.

steps.title: Reject possessive forms
steps.content: Choice A wrongly makes writer possessive. Choice B wrongly makes both work and writer possessive. Choice D correctly makes writers plural but wrongly makes work possessive instead of plural. The answer is C.
